positive: Intricate celestial botanicals arrangement, featuring glowing neon jungle vines intertwining with stylized constellations and deep-sea phosphorescence. The centerpiece is a geometrically symmetrical floral burst, incorporating elements like crescent moons, stylized deep-sea lilies, and bioluminescent hummingbirds. Style: Neo-Art Deco meets Cosmic Surrealism. Composition: Highly centralized, perfect circular flow. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting and strong neon glow against a deep midnight blue background. Color Palette: Electric sapphire, emerald green, vibrant magenta, and deep indigo, with pure white luminous accents. High contrast, vector-quality lines, ideal for screen printing on apparel.
